prompt: A full-body fantasy character illustration on a plain light gray background, painted in polished anime-inspired RPG concept art style with crisp linework, soft rendering, and realistic leather, fur, and skin textures. Show a tall, athletic young man with a muscular build and fair skin, standing in a relaxed contrapposto pose. His right arm is raised across his forehead as if shielding his eyes from light, with his gloved hand touching the brim of a dark cap; his left arm hangs down with a clenched fist. His face is mostly obscured by the raised forearm and cap shadow, making the expression unreadable. He has platinum blond medium-length hair, slightly tousled, visible beneath a black flat cap, with a small earring on one ear. Dress him in layered adventurer clothing dominated by dark brown, black, and muted reddish-brown. The upper body has a fitted black short-sleeve shirt under a brown leather vest with wide straps and buckles, topped with a thick pale fur collar draped around the neck and shoulders. Add a necklace with small metallic ornaments at the collarbone. Both hands wear dark fingerless gloves or fitted leather gloves, with multiple stacked wristbands and bracers. Around the waist, include several crossing leather belts, metal clasps, and hanging accessories, plus a reddish-brown sash tied at the hips with long hanging strips. On the left hip, attach 1 small leather pouch. The pants are slim dark trousers with a strapped harness around 1 thigh, including metal rings and buckles. The boots are 1 matching pair of tall, dark leather lace-up boots with reinforced knee guards or ornate metal-plated shin-and-knee armor, slightly weathered but stylish. From the right side of the waist, let a long torn cloth panel hang down, patterned near the end with subtle decorative motifs and finished with 1 dangling metal charm or spearhead-shaped ornament. Emphasize a rugged handsome adventurer aesthetic, detailed costume design, and a refined game character sheet feel, centered composition, full figure fully visible from head to boots, with a faint soft cast shadow on the floor.
